title: Venezuelan Sweet Fettuccine Pasta
description: A delicious and sweet pasta dish inspired by Venezuelan cuisine. This recipe combines the flavors of silky fettuccine pasta with a sweet and savory sauce.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook fettuccine pasta according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat and sauté garlic until fragrant.
Add diced sweet pepper and cook for 3-4 minutes until tender.
Pour in sweet venezuelan sauce and stir to combine with garlic and pepper.
Reduce heat to low and simmer sauce for 2-3 minutes.
Drain cooked fettuccine pasta and add to skillet with sauce.
Toss pasta to coat with sauce and top with shaved parmesan cheese.
